title: Melpack
description: A modpack for Telos Realms ensuring that you're provided with every mod you may need.
body:
![Melpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee2ea3080b57d6aabcf8d69af4c56727652c8ed6.png) # What is Melpack? **Melpack** is a lightweight, optimized Fabric modpack designed specifically for the **Telos Realms (MC Version 1.21.10)** server. Centered completely around our main mod, **Melinoe**, this pack provides every essential performance and QoL features you need. Our core objective remains the same: **Consistency and Reliability**. Skip the hassle of finding compatible mods with Telos. Melpack is plug-and-play, ensuring you have the best performance and the best tools available the moment you log in. --- ## Included Mods Melpack is centered around Melinoe, the core Telos mod, in addition to a range of performance, optimization, and visual mods:

### Main Mods *Everything you need to conquer Telos Realms.* * **Melinoe:** The ultimate all-in-one Telos mod. Features custom boss tracking, ability range circles, pity counters, session tracking, health alerts/bar, and massive QoL upgrades. * **Xaero's Minimap:** Navigate the realm & dungeons easily to optimize times. * **Chat Plus:** An improved chat experience to keep track & separate all chat, guild chat, drops, and death messages.

### Performance & Optimization *Maximizing your FPS and keeping your game smooth, even in the chaos.* * **Sodium & Sodium Extra:** The standard for rendering optimization, providing massive FPS boosts and extra video settings. * **Lithium:** Heavily optimizes the game's physics and chunk loading. * **FerriteCore:** Drastically reduces the memory usage of the game. * **Immediately Fast:** Speeds up rendering, greatly improving the performance of the UI and HUD. * **Remove Reloading Screen:** Makes resource pack reloading non-intrusive so you can instantly play when logging onto Telos.

### Visuals *Make your game look better without sacrificing performance.* * **Iris Shaders:** Full shaderpack support running directly with Sodium. * **3D Skin Layers:** Improves how skins look dramatically by making them 3D.

### Utilities & Dependencies * **Mod Menu:** A simple, accessible menu to view and configure all your installed mods directly in-game. * **Dependencies:** Includes **Fabric API**, **Fabric Language Kotlin**, **Architectury API**, **Cloth Config API**, and **Forge Config API Port**. ---
⚙️ Installation & Setup ### How to Install: The easiest way to install Melpack is through the official Modrinth App or Prism Launcher. 1. Open your launcher and select **Add Instance** / **Create New Profile**. 2. Search for **Melpack** via the Modrinth search tab. 3. Click **Install** (The launcher will automatically download the correct version of Minecraft and all required mods). 4. Hit Play and jump right into Telos Realms!

### Configuring the Pack: * **Melinoe Settings:** Press **Right-Shift** or type `/melinoe` to open the main Melinoe ClickGUI. * **Editing the HUD:** Run `/melinoe edithud` to freely drag, scale, and customize your on-screen overlays. * **Mod Menu:** Press `ESC` and click the "Mods" button to access configuration screens for Xaero's Minimap, Chat Plus, and more. * **Shaders:** Go to `Options > Video Settings > Shader Packs` to enable or disable any installed Iris shaders. *(Note: Ensure you allocate at least 3-4GB of RAM to your game instance for the smoothest experience!)*
## 💬 Support, Bugs & Suggestions Melpack is constantly evolving alongside Melinoe. While modpack file updates will be posted here on Modrinth; bug reports, and suggestions are handled exclusively through our Discord.

--- *Disclaimer: Melpack and Melinoe are not inherently vouched for by Telos Realms. However, we ensure that every mod and feature present in this pack is completely compliant with Telos rules and will not result in a punishment.*
